query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: Dark cord-like drawstrings hang in cascading curves against translucent fabric that covers a multi-paned window. The window's rectangular grid pattern shows through the material, while pale green and off-white tones occupy the center and left, contrasting with the solid dark area along the right edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavy intentional blur streaks diagonally across translucent fabric and curved drawstrings hanging before a multi-paned window, smearing the pane divisions into flowing bands of desaturated green and cream. The muted, faded color palette and near-total dissolution of fine detail produce an abstract image where texture and tonal movement take precedence over recognizable subject matter.
